examples: The game was a triumph; the team gave a virtuoso performance.
For United, it was a virtuoso performance.
A virtuoso must first be an excellent technician who has made the basic practices habitual.
With its virtuoso tomfoolery, "Fantastic Mr. Fox" is like a homegrown Wallace and Gromit caper.
Guitar virtuoso Ry Cooder is a rock chameleon, hopscotching across genres and geographic locations.
